object.name: adaptiveCard
object.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'message', attachments: [{ contentType: 'application/vnd.microsoft.card.adaptive', content: { '$schema': 'http://adaptivecards.io/schemas/adaptive-card.json', type: 'AdaptiveCard', version: '1.4', body: [ { type: 'TextBlock', size: 'Medium', weight: 'Bolder', text: '📅 Interview Scheduled — ' + $json.payload.positionTitle }, { type: 'FactSet', facts: [ { title: 'Candidate', value: $json.payload.candidateName || '(no candidate linked)' }, { title: 'Date & Time', value: new Date($json.payload.scheduledAt).toLocaleString() }, { title: 'Type', value: $json.payload.type }, { title: 'Duration', value: $json.payload.durationMinutes + ' minutes' }, { title: 'Interviewers', value: ($json.payload.interviewers || []).join(', ') || 'TBD' } ] }, $json.payload.meetingLink ? { type: 'ActionSet', actions: [ { type: 'Action.OpenUrl', title: 'Join Meeting', url: $json.payload.meetingLink } ] } : null ].filter(Boolean) } }] }) }}
